nodes.label: Value
nodes.description: Stores a single scalar value and its gradient, implementing basic arithmetic operations for automatic differentiation.

nodes.label: Layer
nodes.description: Represents a layer of neurons in a neural network, acting as a container for multiple Neuron instances.

nodes.label: Neuron
nodes.description: Represents a single neuron that performs a weighted sum of inputs followed by an optional ReLU activation.

nodes.label: Module
nodes.description: Serves as a base class for neural network components, providing methods to reset gradients and retrieve all model parameters.

nodes.label: MLP
nodes.description: Implements a multilayer perceptron neural network composed of multiple layers of neurons.
